calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-20-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issue, Evedentiary, Monetary And Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Alan R. Silverman for plaintiff and moving party Silverman & Silverman

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Silverman and Silverman's motion for evidentiary sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that defendant failed to respond to discovery and disobeyed the prior order. Defendant is precluded from presenting evidence regarding the defenses pled in her answer to the complaint. Additional monetary sanctions in the amount of $527.50 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Feb-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Scott Aronson for plaintiff and moving party

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $527.50 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
